heading: Prerequisites
body:
To try these tutorials, you must have the following:

- A cluster with MongoDB version v8.0 or later.

- The [Project Data Access Admin](<Project Data Access Admin>) access to the project to
  create MongoDB Vector Search and MongoDB Search indexes.

- The sample\_mflix database loaded into your
  cluster.

- [mongosh](mongodb-shell) or MongoDB Compass to create the indexes and try the queries on
  your cluster.

  > **Note:** You can also try these hybrid search use cases with local Atlas
  > deployments that you create with the Atlas CLI and in your
  > self-managed (on-premises) deployments. To learn more,
  > see [Create a Local Atlas Deployment](atlas/cli/current/atlas-cli-deploy-local).
